docs.title: Radar Alerting for Mangrove Monitoring (RAMM)
docs.text:
• Dr. Andrew Dean - Hatfield Consultants LLP
  • Benjamin Smith - Hatfield Consultants LLP
  • Pete Bunting - Aberystwyth University
  • Dr. Victor Tang - Hatfield Consultants LLP
  • Lammert Hildarides - Wetlands International
  • Frank Marking Seifert - European Space Agency (ESA)

docs.title: RAMM
docs.text: RAMM is a dynamic, event-driven, pipeline that leverages Sentinel-1 Sythnetic Aperature Radar (SAR) information to complement the existing and running optical satellite pipeline by Global Mangfove Watch (GMW). Optical satellite imagery #has been able to provide timely alerting for mangrove deforestation alerting, however, it has a drawback when the monitored area is cloud covered. SAR has the ability to penetrate clouds and detect these possible missed events.
